CONTENT.Club career: He spent his youth and senior career in Åsane. In the summer of 2021 Mvuka signed for FK Bodø/Glimt.On 31 January 2023, Mvuka signed a four-and-a-half-year contract with the French club Lorient and was loaned back to FK Bodø/Glimt until the end of the 2022–23 season.On 20 January 2024, Mvuka was loaned to Young Boys in Switzerland, with an option to buy.
CONTENT.Personal life: Born in Norway to Burundian parents. He is also of Rwandan descent. Mvuka had to stop football for 8 months as a teenager due to heart irregularities, but returned after he was properly diagnosed.

SUMMARY: Joel Mugisha Mvuka (born 12 November 2002) is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays as a forward for Swiss Super League club Young Boys, on loan from  Ligue 2 club Lorient.
